message:
test(conformance): add LATENCY HISTOGRAM conformance tests

- Add latency_histogram_empty: verify empty array response
- Add latency_histogram_with_commands: verify with command args
- Update latency_help expected output to include HISTOGRAM

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1459,6 +1459,10 @@
             "kind": "bulk",
             "value": "HISTORY <event> - Return latency history for an event."
           },
+          {
+            "kind": "bulk",
+            "value": "HISTOGRAM [command ...] - Return latency histograms for commands."
+          },
           {
             "kind": "bulk",
             "value": "RESET [<event> ...] - Reset latency data."
@@ -1627,6 +1631,32 @@
         "value": "ERR Unknown subcommand or wrong number of arguments for 'nosuch'. Try LATENCY HELP."
       }
     },
+    {
+      "name": "latency_histogram_empty",
+      "now_ms": 24001,
+      "argv": [
+        "LATENCY",
+        "HISTOGRAM"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": []
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "latency_histogram_with_commands",
+      "now_ms": 24002,
+      "argv": [
+        "LATENCY",
+        "HISTOGRAM",
+        "GET",
+        "SET"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "array",
+        "value": []
+      }
+    },
     {
       "name": "command_docs",
       "now_ms": 24000,
